## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Configure connector/channel '...'
3. Send message '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, and status codes.

## Impact

- [ ] Message loss / duplication / corruption (data integrity)
- [ ] PHI exposure risk
- [ ] Crash / availability
- [ ] Incorrect result, but no data loss
- [ ] Cosmetic / minor

## Environment

- Mirthless version / commit:
- Deployment: (Docker / local dev / other)
- Node.js version:
- PostgreSQL version:
- OS:
- Connector type(s) involved (if any):

paste relevant logs here

## Additional Context

Anything else that might help us reproduce or diagnose.
